_format_rules: structs: reusable nested type definitions, referenced by name in fields
protocol_types: the top-level message definitions parseLab generates parsers for
Each field has: name (required), type (required), value (optional), dependee (optional)
Primitive types: U8, U16, U32, U64, I8, I16, I32, I64, F32, D8
Variable-length arrays: U8[length_field_name] — requires a dependee length field
Enumerations: type=U32 with pipe-separated value string e.g. '0|1|2|3'
dependee: 'true' marks a field as a length counter for a variable array
